overall_justification: The newspaper edition primarily provides factual reporting on market conditions (exchange rates, coffee prices), and while the "CAMFIO" section mentions exchange rate fluctuations and potential future impacts on coffee, it doesn't explicitly advocate for either the Orthodox or Expansionist view of the Caixa de Conversão.  It acknowledges the ongoing "game" of exchange rate speculation but refrains from taking a definitive position on the ideal conversion rate or the broader monetary policy implications of the Caixa.

supporting_evidence.quote: O CAMFIO. — Tivemos o mercado destituído de maior interesse, sendo ainda bastante firme o seu estado que continuava a ser de alta moderada.
supporting_evidence.reason_for_inclusion: This sets the overall tone of the market report as factual and observational.

supporting_evidence.quote: Com effeito, os comparsas do jogo de alta e de baixa, conforme os interesses a que se prenderam, vão liquidando do melhor modo que podem, notando-se, porém, que em razão da alta, tem havido mais oferta do que procura.
supporting_evidence.reason_for_inclusion: This describes the market dynamics without endorsing any particular stance on the Caixa.

supporting_evidence.quote: Em quanto for assim, correndo as próprias letras, bem vai ; quando, porém. estas tarem-se, terão de recorrer ao café, que será a vítima, ou aos recursos extraordinários no exterior, para sustentar a nota.
supporting_evidence.reason_for_inclusion: This raises a potential concern about the impact of exchange rates on the coffee market, but doesn't explicitly connect it to the Caixa de Conversão debate in a way that reveals a clear editorial stance.
